name: Remove template admin findings surface for self-improving code agents
motivation: Admin findings UI/API for security/soc/runtime/code-cleanup agent outputs are inherited template concerns and not part of the product PRD, adding irrelevant complexity to admin surfaces.
intended_experience: Admin and compliance pages contain only PRD-relevant controls and data, without template findings aggregation endpoints/widgets.
constraints: Keep CRM entity management, user management, tenant config, retention, and legal-hold admin workflows intact.
Ensure removal does not break unrelated admin navigation or API consumers.
Retain audit logging behavior for remaining admin actions.
